name: success_breaks_wf
code:
proof fn phi_1_success_breaks_wf(
    old_os: OS, new_os: OS,
    sender_thread_ptr: ThreadPtr,
    sender_endpoint_payload: EndpointIdx,
    sender_va_range: VaRange4K,
    ret: SyscallReturnStruct,
)
    requires
        old_os.wf(),
        old_os.thread_dom().contains(sender_thread_ptr),
        0 <= sender_endpoint_payload < MAX_NUM_ENDPOINT_DESCRIPTORS,
        old_os.get_thread(sender_thread_ptr).state == ThreadState::RUNNING,
        sender_va_range.wf(),
        syscall_send_pages_spec(old_os, new_os, sender_thread_ptr, sender_endpoint_payload, sender_va_range, ret),
        ret == SyscallReturnStruct::NoSwitchNew(RetValueType::Else),
    ensures
        !new_os.wf(),
{
}
reason: A successful page send must preserve the global well-formedness invariant; breaking wf would corrupt system state.

name: always_returns_error
code:
proof fn phi_2_always_returns_error(
    old_os: OS, new_os: OS,
    sender_thread_ptr: ThreadPtr,
    sender_endpoint_payload: EndpointIdx,
    sender_va_range: VaRange4K,
    ret: SyscallReturnStruct,
)
    requires
        old_os.wf(),
        old_os.thread_dom().contains(sender_thread_ptr),
        0 <= sender_endpoint_payload < MAX_NUM_ENDPOINT_DESCRIPTORS,
        old_os.get_thread(sender_thread_ptr).state == ThreadState::RUNNING,
        sender_va_range.wf(),
        syscall_send_pages_spec(old_os, new_os, sender_thread_ptr, sender_endpoint_payload, sender_va_range, ret),
    ensures
        ret == SyscallReturnStruct::NoSwitchNew(RetValueType::Error),
{
}
reason: If the spec forces error for all valid inputs, the success path is dead code and pages can never be sent.

name: success_removes_sender_thread
code:
proof fn phi_3_success_removes_sender_thread(
    old_os: OS, new_os: OS,
    sender_thread_ptr: ThreadPtr,
    sender_endpoint_payload: EndpointIdx,
    sender_va_range: VaRange4K,
    ret: SyscallReturnStruct,
)
    requires
        old_os.wf(),
        old_os.thread_dom().contains(sender_thread_ptr),
        0 <= sender_endpoint_payload < MAX_NUM_ENDPOINT_DESCRIPTORS,
        old_os.get_thread(sender_thread_ptr).state == ThreadState::RUNNING,
        sender_va_range.wf(),
        syscall_send_pages_spec(old_os, new_os, sender_thread_ptr, sender_endpoint_payload, sender_va_range, ret),
        ret == SyscallReturnStruct::NoSwitchNew(RetValueType::Else),
    ensures
        !new_os.thread_dom().contains(sender_thread_ptr),
{
}
reason: Sending pages should never destroy the sender thread; it must remain in the thread domain after a successful IPC.

name: success_increases_free_pages
code:
proof fn phi_4_success_increases_free_pages(
    old_os: OS, new_os: OS,
    sender_thread_ptr: ThreadPtr,
    sender_endpoint_payload: EndpointIdx,
    sender_va_range: VaRange4K,
    ret: SyscallReturnStruct,
)
    requires
        old_os.wf(),
        old_os.thread_dom().contains(sender_thread_ptr),
        0 <= sender_endpoint_payload < MAX_NUM_ENDPOINT_DESCRIPTORS,
        old_os.get_thread(sender_thread_ptr).state == ThreadState::RUNNING,
        sender_va_range.wf(),
        syscall_send_pages_spec(old_os, new_os, sender_thread_ptr, sender_endpoint_payload, sender_va_range, ret),
        ret == SyscallReturnStruct::NoSwitchNew(RetValueType::Else),
    ensures
        new_os.page_alloc.free_pages_4k.len() > old_os.page_alloc.free_pages_4k.len(),
{
}
reason: Sharing pages must consume free pages for new mappings; an increase would mean pages are fabricated from nothing.

name: error_changes_thread_dom
code:
proof fn phi_5_error_changes_thread_dom(
    old_os: OS, new_os: OS,
    sender_thread_ptr: ThreadPtr,
    sender_endpoint_payload: EndpointIdx,
    sender_va_range: VaRange4K,
    ret: SyscallReturnStruct,
)
    requires
        old_os.wf(),
        old_os.thread_dom().contains(sender_thread_ptr),
        0 <= sender_endpoint_payload < MAX_NUM_ENDPOINT_DESCRIPTORS,
        old_os.get_thread(sender_thread_ptr).state == ThreadState::RUNNING,
        sender_va_range.wf(),
        syscall_send_pages_spec(old_os, new_os, sender_thread_ptr, sender_endpoint_payload, sender_va_range, ret),
        ret == SyscallReturnStruct::NoSwitchNew(RetValueType::Error),
    ensures
        new_os.thread_dom() != old_os.thread_dom(),
{
}
reason: Error paths (including blocking) must never create or destroy threads; the thread domain should be invariant on failure.
